profile.title: My Profile
profile.name: Name
profile.verify_text: Upload a passport photograph for verification.
profile.locked_fields: Email, NIN, and role cannot be edited here.
profile.rejected_text: Your last verification review was rejected. Capture and upload a new live passport photo to submit again.
profile.live_step_1: 1. Start camera and complete all liveness checks.
profile.live_step_2: 2. Capture a clear face photo inside the frame.
profile.live_step_3: 3. Upload after capture. File upload is disabled.
profile.preview_hint: Ensure your face is sharp and fully visible before uploading.
profile.camera_guide: Keep your face inside the guide and complete all checks.

properties.select_valid_location: Select a valid location before paying
properties.already_have_access: You already have access to this location
properties.location_access_start_failed: Failed to start location access payment
properties.location_access_text: Your tenant account can browse properties in your registered state and LGA. Pay once to unlock this selected location.
properties.access_lasts: Access lasts for {{days}} days after payment.
properties.featured_note: Showing featured listings ordered by creation date.
properties.show_request_form: Can't find your preferred property? Submit a request
properties.request_intro: Submit your request and we will notify you by email and WhatsApp once a matching property is available. A support admin reviews each request before it is assigned to the state team.
properties.request_fee_text: A one-time {{amount}} payment or more is required before the request is processed.
properties.request_free_text: Requests are currently submitted immediately without payment.
properties.request_select_location_fee: Select both state and local government area to confirm the exact fee.
properties.request_required: Name, email and property type are required
properties.request_state_required: Select your preferred state to calculate the request fee
properties.request_lga_required: Select your preferred local government area to calculate the request fee
properties.request_success: Request submitted successfully. Support admin will review it before the state team starts sourcing.
